name: Avid CTMS API
description: The Avid Platform CTMS (Common Type and Method System) API provides a HAL-based REST interface for querying and managing media assets (video, audio, metadata, folder structures) in Avid MediaCentral. Assets are organized in a common object hierarchy with folder structures, supporting operations like browse, search, export, and metadata management across different system types (Interplay MAM, Interplay Production, MediaCentral UX).
